source.cookbook: The Vegan Korean   Complete Guide And Cookbook so
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
½ cup peeled and split mung beans, soaked in warm water for at least two hours
	1 cup water
	1 Tbsp doenjang or brown miso
	2 tsps sugar
	½ cup brown rice flour
	1 cup of chopped chives (scallions and leeks are good, too)
	1 cup of shredded carrot
	a couple Tbsps oil for pan-frying (any neutral-flavored oil, I used sunflower)
ingredients.original:
½ cup peeled and split mung beans, soaked in warm water for at least two hours
	1 cup water
	1 Tbsp doenjang or brown miso
	2 tsps sugar
	½ cup brown rice flour
	1 cup of chopped chives (scallions and leeks are good, too)
	1 cup of shredded carrot
	a couple Tbsps oil for pan-frying (any neutral-flavored oil, I used sunflower)

ingredients.item:
3 Tbsps soy sauce
	1 tsp sesame oil
	¾ tsp sugar
	¾ tsp gochugaru (Korean red pepper flakes) or ½ tsp common red pepper flakes
	2 tsps toasted sesame seeds
ingredients.original:
3 Tbsps soy sauce
	1 tsp sesame oil
	¾ tsp sugar
	¾ tsp gochugaru (Korean red pepper flakes) or ½ tsp common red pepper flakes
	2 tsps toasted sesame seeds
